title: Email To line not populating and fail to load timeline item
excerpt: We have been using Monday.com happily for over a year. When someone fills out the form on our website, the item is created on the board. We then click into the item, go to Emails and Activities and press New Email. All f…

posts.author: ralphhosf (Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have been using Monday.com happily for over a year. When someone fills out the form on our website, the item is created on the board. We then click into the item, go to Emails and Activities and press New Email. All fine until today. For some reason when we go into the Item and click on New Email, the To line is empty. It no longer fills in the email address of the item. When I hand type the email address in and press send, it says “Failed to load Timeline Item”.

Is this a temporary issue?

posts.author: ralphhosf (Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml: I should say, I have also tried the classic log out and log back in trick. And also tried to remove the connected account and synced it back up.

posts.author: ChrisCollings (Chris Collings)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ralphhosf You’re not alone. I am having exactly the same issue. I’ve been successfully sending email through Monday for some time. Then, suddenly today the email address doesn’t populate.
I hope it’s resolved soon.

posts.author: ChrisCollings (Chris Collings)
posts.cookedHtml: @ralphhosf Mine is back working today, did yours get resolved too?

posts.author: ralphhosf (Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah it just started working again. Guess it was a monday.com bug.

posts.author: ralphhosf (Ralph)
posts.cookedHtml: Down again with another issue. We’re ready to go elsewhere as it’s so buggy. Anyone have software that they can migrate to?
